title: Les Amoureux
writer: Jean-Georges Auriol, Marcel L'Herbier, Francis de Croisset
actors: Charles Boyer, Natalie Paley, Marguerite Templey
plot: The wife of a Hungarian gentleman tires of helping him cheat and becomes the mistress of a diplomat.When she re-encounters her husband he is enfeebled and ill, so she takes pity on him.
